news.title:
Hindustan Zinc shares fell 6% amid market sell-off and declining silver prices, trading at ₹489.80, down 4.85%.
Hindustan Zinc partners with Tata Steel to expand EcoZen, a low-carbon zinc solution, promoting sustainable steel manufacturing.
news.summary:
Hindustan Zinc shares fell 6% amid market sell-off and declining silver prices, trading at ₹489.80, down 4.85%.
Hindustan Zinc partners with Tata Steel to expand EcoZen, a low-carbon zinc solution, promoting sustainable steel manufacturing.

news.title:
Hindustan Zinc and Tata Steel partner to use EcoZen, a low-carbon zinc product, to cut emissions in steel manufacturing.
EcoZen reduces emissions by 75% vs global zinc average; Hindustan Zinc shares down 5%, Tata Steel down 4.4% on Monday.
news.summary:
Hindustan Zinc and Tata Steel partner to use EcoZen, a low-carbon zinc product, to cut emissions in steel manufacturing.
EcoZen reduces emissions by 75% vs global zinc average; Hindustan Zinc shares down 5%, Tata Steel down 4.4% on Monday.

news.title:
Metal stocks, including Vedanta, Tata Steel, and Hindustan Copper, fell up to 6% as Nifty Metal index dropped 4.25%.
Geopolitical tensions and supply concerns led to fears of demand destruction, impacting steel and aluminium producers.
news.summary:
Metal stocks, including Vedanta, Tata Steel, and Hindustan Copper, fell up to 6% as Nifty Metal index dropped 4.25%.
Geopolitical tensions and supply concerns led to fears of demand destruction, impacting steel and aluminium producers.

news.title:
UK's tariff and quota changes may support Tata Steel's UK business but breakeven shifts to FY27.
Analysts say policy benefits will be gradual; weak UK pricing remains a challenge for Tata Steel.
news.summary:
UK's tariff and quota changes may support Tata Steel's UK business but breakeven shifts to FY27.
Analysts say policy benefits will be gradual; weak UK pricing remains a challenge for Tata Steel.

news.title:
Tata Steel benefits from India's growth and lower global cost outlook.
Protection measures in EU, UK strengthen Tata Steel's geographic positioning.

news.title:
Tata Steel, M&M, JSW Steel, and Tech Mahindra led Nifty gains this week.
Waaree, Premier, Paytm, Angel One, and Page Industries rose in midcaps; Petronet, Bandhan Bank fell.
news.summary:

news.title:
Sensex closes 326 points higher; Nifty above 23,100.
Tata Steel and TechM each gain 3% during market session.

news.title:
Punjab CM inaugurates Tata Steel's ₹3,200-cr green steel plant in Ludhiana.
The plant spans 115 acres, with 0.75 MT capacity, creating 2,500 jobs.
news.summary:
Punjab CM inaugurates Tata Steel's ₹3,200-cr green steel plant in Ludhiana.
The plant spans 115 acres, with 0.75 MT capacity, creating 2,500 jobs.

news.title:
Tata Steel Ltd. redeemed a ₹200 crore Commercial Paper (CP) on March 20, 2026.
The redemption aligns with SEBI's guidelines for non-convertible securities and commercial papers.
news.summary:
Tata Steel Ltd. redeemed a ₹200 crore Commercial Paper (CP) on March 20, 2026.
The redemption aligns with SEBI's guidelines for non-convertible securities and commercial papers.

news.title: Steel stocks rise with Tata Steel, JSW Steel, and Jindal Steel leading gains.
news.summary: Steel stocks rise with Tata Steel, JSW Steel, and Jindal Steel leading gains.

news.title:
Tata Steel gains on launch of scrap-based electric arc furnace.
Tata Steel's Q3 FY26 profit surged 723.1% to Rs 2,688.7 crore.
news.summary:
Tata Steel gains on launch of scrap-based electric arc furnace.
Tata Steel's Q3 FY26 profit surged 723.1% to Rs 2,688.7 crore.

news.title:
Tata Steel opens India's first scrap-based Electric Arc Furnace in Ludhiana with 0.75 MT/year capacity.
The ₹3,200 crore plant uses 50% renewable energy, 100% scrap, aligning with its 2045 Net Zero goal.
news.summary:
Tata Steel opens India's first scrap-based Electric Arc Furnace in Ludhiana with 0.75 MT/year capacity.
The ₹3,200 crore plant uses 50% renewable energy, 100% scrap, aligning with its 2045 Net Zero goal.

news.title:
HSBC upgrades Tata Steel to Buy, raising target price to Rs 250 from Rs 235.
UK imposes 50% tariffs and reduces quotas, impacting Tata Steel.
news.summary:

news.title:
Tata Steel focuses on India operations, bolstering growth strategy.
Company supports Europe turnaround with $2B infusion.

news.title:
Tata Steel merges NINL, consolidating domestic units to secure raw materials and boost efficiency.
It injects $2B into European operations for green transition, debt repayment, and restructuring.

news.title:
Stocks to watch include Maruti Suzuki, Tata Steel, TCS, PNB, Varun Beverages, and Urban Company due to key developments.
Strides Pharma, Varun Beverages, and Tata Steel announce strategic acquisitions, while TCS expands Chennai office by 1.47 lakh sq ft.

news.title:
Urban Company sees DF International Partners II LLC exit via block deal; Tata Steel merges NINL, plans $2B investment.
Maruti Suzuki faces ₹5,786-cr tax order; Varun Beverages acquires 100% stake in Crickley Dairy via its SA subsidiary.
news.summary:

The partnership aims to develop innovative low-carbon steelmaking technologies.

news.title:
Tata Steel acquired 49% equity, 31.85% preference shares in Medica TS Hospital.
The acquisition for ₹1.49 crore makes it a wholly-owned subsidiary in Kalinganagar.

news.title:
Tata Steel approves Neelachal Ispat Nigam merger, plans $2B investment in Tata Steel Holdings from FY26-27.
The board greenlights securities purchase in Medica TS Hospital for ₹14.9M.
news.summary:
